ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the experiment */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the response was made in */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the response was made to */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to make the response */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (true or false) */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., correct, incorrect, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the reaction time is for */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time for the response */,
  "reaction_time_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of reaction times for the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the error was made in */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., false positive, false negative) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, experiment designer, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, device type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_versions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collaborator is part of */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., co-investigator, research assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
